description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa with a boxy, geometric silhouette and a dark gray fabric upholstery. The sofa features four large, loose throw pillows—two in a light gray color and two in a muted blue—arranged symmetrically for both comfort and visual interest. The seat and back cushions are thick and plush, providing ample support, and appear to be separate from the main frame. The armrests are wide, straight, and at the same height as the backrest, contributing to the sofa's contemporary look. The base is supported by four short, exposed wooden legs with a natural finish, slightly elevating the sofa off the ground. The upholstery has a subtle woven texture, giving the surface a matte, soft appearance.
description: A modern, boxy dark gray two-seater sofa with wide armrests, four large throw pillows in blue and gray, and short wooden legs. The upholstery is subtly textured and the cushions are plush and inviting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of four large throw pillows and the full width of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight, wide armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the clean, uninterrupted upholstery on the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, showing the armrest, cushion depth, and pillow profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and two large back cushions, all uniform in size and shape, with four loose throw pillows (two blue, two light gray) symmetrically placed at the back.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight, and boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a flat profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, exposed wooden legs positioned at the corners, rectangular in shape with a natural wood finish and a simple, block style.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with no visible segmentation or tufting, supporting two large back cushions and loose pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a subtle woven texture, no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
